training_status: Weight lifting 4-5 times per week, on a moderate cut for 7 months

protocol_notes: OP is planning to use BPC-157 for a nagging shoulder (prior AC/rotator cuff tear). Considering Retatrutide and Tesamorelin for fat loss. Considering lean bulking with Tesamorelin and possibly IGF-LR3. Concerned about family cancer history and side effects of IGF-LR3. Has discussed with a doctor and done blood work.
